executives.name: Michael Anglin
executives.background: Lead Independent Director. Former executive at BHP Billiton with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Timothy Baker
executives.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

board_of_directors.background: Lead Independent Director. Former executive at BHP Billiton with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Timothy Baker
board_of_directors.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

board_of_directors.name: William Hayes
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hayes has been a director since 2008 and Chairman of the Board since 2014. He was previously an executive at Placer Dome Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Senior Independent Director, Chairman of the Audit and Risk Committee)
